title: Instance of empty module remains in results of mxe synthesis

features.name: synth_translate_off directive with all contents removed
features.description: Code should include synthesis directives that remove all module contents, such as synth_translate_off covering the entire module body resulting in an empty module

features.name: instantiation of emptied module with flatten synthesis
features.description: Code should include an instance of a module that has been emptied via synthesis directives, where the parent module undergoes flatten synthesis pass

features.name: unconnected output port becomes zero-sized array
features.description: Code should include output ports that become zero-sized arrays in EDIF output when their connections are removed due to empty module contents
features.snippet: output reg [15:0] douta; // unconnected in instantiation
